function: Convert rider hand input into braking command
potential_failure_mode: Lever pivot binds or has excessive friction
potential_effect: Delayed braking command or delayed release
potential_cause: Corrosion dirt ingress poor pivot tolerance
recommended_action: Specify sealed pivot bushing and inspection procedure

function: Maintain structural integrity under hand load
potential_cause: Stress concentration low material strength impact damage
current_control: Static load test and visual inspection
recommended_action: Add fatigue design review and material specification

potential_effect: Sudden or severe loss of braking force
potential_cause: Insufficient clamp force missing retainer poor assembly
current_control: Torque check and functional brake test
recommended_action: Add positive retention feature and torque verification

potential_effect: Reduced braking force and increased stopping distance
potential_cause: Fatigue sharp routing wear at anchor
recommended_action: Improve cable routing and add replacement interval

potential_cause: Intermittent cable movement air in hydraulic line or sticking linkage
recommended_action: Add assembly bleed procedure and cable movement check

function: Convert transmitted force to clamping force
potential_failure_mode: Caliper piston or sliding mechanism sticks
potential_effect: Brake drag or reduced clamping response
potential_cause: Corrosion debris seal swelling poor lubrication
recommended_action: Improve dust sealing and service cleaning guidance

potential_effect: Uneven pad wear vibration and reduced braking consistency
potential_cause: Poor mounting tolerance bent bracket loose adjustment
recommended_action: Add alignment fixture and torque sequence

potential_effect: Increased stopping distance and loss of braking margin
potential_cause: Normal wear abrasive debris poor maintenance
recommended_action: Add wear indicator and minimum thickness instruction

potential_failure_mode: Pad contamination by oil water or debris
recommended_action: Add shielding and replacement instruction after contamination

potential_effect: Braking force decreases during repeated stops or slope descent
recommended_action: Specify thermal performance test and high-temperature compound

potential_failure_mode: Rotor warps or has excessive runout
recommended_action: Define runout limit and rotor material control

potential_effect: Reduced heat capacity and braking performance
potential_cause: Abrasion low material hardness delayed replacement
recommended_action: Mark minimum thickness and add inspection interval

potential_failure_mode: Brake cable or caliper mounting attachment fails
potential_effect: Severe loss of braking or misalignment
potential_cause: Vibration insufficient torque missing locking feature
recommended_action: Use locking fastener and torque-mark inspection

potential_cause: Fatigue high load poor bracket geometry
recommended_action: Increase bracket safety factor and fatigue analysis

potential_failure_mode: Brakes do not engage when commanded
potential_effect: Excessive stopping distance and collision risk
potential_cause: Cable detachment hydraulic leak severe caliper failure
recommended_action: Add pre-ride check and fail-safe design review

potential_failure_mode: Brakes engage too aggressively or unexpectedly
potential_effect: Wheel lock skid or rider fall
potential_cause: Poor modulation excessive leverage sticking mechanism
recommended_action: Tune leverage ratio and verify modulation behavior
